subcodes.first_line: O true friends of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! The edifice of violation is but a spider's web, while the structure of the Covenant is firmly established [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان حقیقی عبدالبهاء بنیان نقض نسج عنکبوتست و ایوان پیمان بنیان
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @firmness in the Covenant, @avoidance of Covenant-Breakers
